content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with all sectors green; PSU Bank +1.67%, Auto +1.49%, IT +1.18% leading. India VIX cooling -2.12% to 17.53 supports risk-on. Global cues strong (Nasdaq +1.03%). Existing book is largely working — focus this tick on trailing SLs on winners and avoiding cluster stacking.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1038.51,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+7.7% unrealized, current SL 1038.51 already above entry (locked breakeven+5.5%). CMP 1059.50, SL gap ~2% — within 1% trail-gap discipline floor. No-op MODIFY would waste signal; HOLD is correct disposition. Wait — emitting HOLD via position_actions instead. Skipping this MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+7.7% winner. SL 1038.51 already locks ~+5.5% gain (well above entry). Gap to CMP 1059.50 is ~2% — adequate trail-gap. Q4 results were Apr 21, no near-term binary. Thesis intact (NBFC sector strength, +18% PAT). Hold to target 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.1%, recovering today +1.05% on weaker dollar/geopolitical risk. SL 119 (~3.8% below CMP), thesis intact as defensive hedge. No change warranted."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1715 already above entry 1700 (locked +0.9%). CMP 1737, gap to SL ~1.3% — within trail-gap floor. No-op risk if I move SL up further; would breach 1% gap. Replacing this with HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.2%, near 52-week high 1748.60. SL 1715 locks +0.9% gain. CMP-SL gap ~1.3% — at trail-gap minimum. Q4 results already reported (Apr 30, beat). Dividend record date June 12. Thesis intact, hold to target 1820."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Near breakeven (-0.1%). PSU Bank +1.67%, sector rotation supportive. SL 204 (~2.3% below CMP). Q4 already printed (Apr 29, +68% PAT). 52w high 212.66 just hit. Hold for target 222."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4% but Q4/FY26 board meeting MAY 14 — binary catalyst within 6 trading sessions. Per binary-event discipline at <3 sessions disposition would be exit/trim; we're at 6 sessions, manageable. Position size ~5% of portfolio (50k/1M), within 5% event-trade tolerance. SL 4540 (~2.2% below CMP). Will reassess on May 11-12 to either tighten SL or exit ahead of May 14 results."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.6%, opened at 378 then sold off to 368.65 on profit-taking after Q4 was reported May 4 (+155% PAT, hit 52w high 399). Stock now -8% from high. SL 372 was the floor — CMP 368.65 has BREACHED SL. However reported P&L still shows position. Given CMP < SL, this should likely have stopped out automatically. If still held, holding is appropriate as the broader capex tailwind intact and selling at SL level offers no edge. Letting SL execute naturally."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.0%, recovering today +1.17%. Q4 results May 5 were strong (PAT +124% YoY, FY26 PAT +104%, net-debt negative). Stock spiked to 1577 intraday before fading. Realty +0.67% supportive. SL 1420 (~2.6% below CMP). Thesis intact post-strong Q4. Hold for target 1570."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6950.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.3% unrealized, CMP 6995. Q4 already reported Apr 30 (beat consensus). Trail SL from 6900 (entry-flat) to 6950 to lock breakeven+0.7%. New SL gap to CMP ~0.65% — TOO TIGHT, fails 1% trail-gap discipline. Reverting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.3% with Q4 print already past (Apr 30 beat). SL 6900 = entry. Tightening SL further would breach 1% trail-gap floor (CMP 6995, any SL above ~6925 too tight). Holding current SL gives room for normal chop. Target 7400 intact, near 52w high 7200 with breakout potential."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1038.51 already locks +5.5% gain. CMP-SL gap ~2% within trail discipline. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, recovering today. SL 119 adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1715 locks +0.9%. Trail-gap to CMP ~1.3%, at the floor. Don't tighten."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near breakeven, banking sector strong, Q4 beat already in. SL 204 fine."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "May 14 board meeting flagged. Position ~5% portfolio, event-trade tolerance ok. Reassess May 12-13 for SL tightening or exit ahead of binary."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.65 vs SL 372 — at/below SL. Allowing SL to execute naturally on broker side."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 May 5 (+124% PAT). Recovering today. SL 1420 absorbs further chop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+2.3% but tightening SL breaches 1% trail-gap floor. Hold at entry-level SL 6900."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "TITAGARH already has OPEN BUY @ 838 — CMP 843 above limit, won't fill at current levels; thesis intact (capital goods, railway capex, +9.59%) so leaving order to work. Will not duplicate. RRKABEL faded -5% post-Q4 on flat margins; bearish research signal — pass. POLYCAB has Q4 results AT 4PM TODAY — binary event, NO_ACTION. FINCABLES Q4 May 10 (4 sessions) — binary event proximity rules out new entry. SUMICHEM rich at 42x P/E with bearish chart patterns (Bearish Engulfing/Shooting Star pre-rally) — pass on chase. CAMS/COFORGE/M&M/MARICO already gapped 5-9%, chasing breakouts after the move is poor R:R. CHOLAHLDNG/GABRIEL noted but financials cluster risk (already hold PNBHOUSING + BANDHANBNK in financials, ~14% of book). VEDL near 52w high — would consider but metals cluster light, monitor for pullback entry.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 43% deployed with 8 positions across financials (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK), realty (SOBHA), capital goods (HAL, BHEL), services (ADANIPORTS), chemicals (NAVINFLUOR), and ETF (GOLDBEES). Current unrealized +6,648 — book is working. TITAGARH OPEN BUY adds capital goods exposure if filled. No new entries this tick: (a) most movers already gapped 5-10%, chase R:R poor, (b) POLYCAB Q4 tonight is sector-wide binary risk for cables names, (c) FINCABLES Q4 in 4 sessions = binary-event rule excludes new entry, (d) HAL Q4 May 14 means Capital Goods cluster has earnings calendar risk. Tick discipline: trail-gap floor (1%) prevents tightening SLs further on PNBHOUSING/ADANIPORTS/NAVINFLUOR — micro-tightening would cause forced exits on noise. Will reassess HAL ahead of May 14 board meeting (3 sessions before = May 11)."
}
